properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come, every soul by sin oppressed, There’s mercy with the Lord, And He will surely give you rest, By trusting in His Word.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only trust Him, only trust Him, Only trust Him now; He will save you, He will save you, He will save you now.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For Jesus shed His precious blood Rich blessings to bestow; Plunge now into the crimson flood That washes white as snow.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, Jesus is the Truth, the Way, That leads you into rest; Believe in Him without delay, And you are fully blest.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come, then, and join this holy band, And on to glory go, To dwell in that celestial land, Where joys immortal flow.
